name: rubber-duck-for-codex
description: Rubber-ducking skills for checkpointed Codex reasoning.

interface.shortDescription: Checkpoint Codex reasoning with a partner.
interface.longDescription: Rubber Duck For Codex adds two skills: one to open, checkpoint, and close a rubber-ducking dialogue during non-trivial turns, and one to act as the partner that checks drafts, decisions, evidence, drift, and user-request fulfillment.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use rubber-ducking to pressure-test this turn.
